description: Historical Sicilian Mafia clan from the Pagliarelli area in Palermo, founded in 1936. One of the oldest active Mafia clans in Palermo, it has been involved in the Sicilian Mafia Commission and allied with the Corleonesi. Members have been convicted for murders of anti-mafia judges and rival clan members. Currently led by Giovanni Motisi, a fugitive since 1993.
